raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is within the right arm workspace and its lateral surfaces are unobstructed. The claw can securely envelop the 5 cm diameter of the cup.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is firmly held by the right claw gripper and lifted slightly above the tabletop."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table area front-right (clear zone)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and the designated front-right area of the table is free of obstacles and large enough (≥ 10 cm²).",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is released upright on the front-right clear zone of the table, leaving the space in front of the boxes unobstructed."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The front face of box_2 is now unobstructed after relocating the cup. There is at least 40 cm of free space to the right of box_2 to accommodate the push motion, and no objects are behind the robot that would hinder arm movement.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is translated ~40 cm to the right, clearing the right side of box_1 and providing unobstructed lateral access to both sides of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both the left and right sides of box_1 are fully accessible after moving box_2. There is sufficient vertical clearance (≥ 35 cm) above the box for lifting, and the table surface around the box is clear.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is securely held between the robot’s two end-effectors, lifted approximately 10 cm above the tabletop, completing the task of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is within the right arm workspace and its lateral surfaces are unobstructed. The claw can securely envelop the 5 cm diameter of the cup.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is firmly held by the right claw gripper and lifted slightly above the tabletop.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and the designated front-right area of the table is free of obstacles and large enough (≥ 10 cm²).
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is released upright on the front-right clear zone of the table, leaving the space in front of the boxes unobstructed.

parsed_json.Precondition: The front face of box_2 is now unobstructed after relocating the cup. There is at least 40 cm of free space to the right of box_2 to accommodate the push motion, and no objects are behind the robot that would hinder arm movement.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is translated ~40 cm to the right, clearing the right side of box_1 and providing unobstructed lateral access to both sides of box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both the left and right sides of box_1 are fully accessible after moving box_2. There is sufficient vertical clearance (≥ 35 cm) above the box for lifting, and the table surface around the box is clear.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is securely held between the robot’s two end-effectors, lifted approximately 10 cm above the tabletop, completing the task of picking up the darker box.
